final_chunks.section_title: MONDAY'S PRICE ACTION (JULY 26, 2021)
final_chunks.text:
MONDAY'S PRICE ACTION (JULY 26, 2021)
On Monday, July 26, 2021, on a five-minute chart, the opening price was at midnight. Price traded down into the London session, taking out a short-term low. After this, observe for a rally.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Market Maker Series Vol. 5 of 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MONDAY'S POST-OTE PRICE ACTION AND DAILY HIGH FORMATION
final_chunks.text:
MONDAY'S POST-OTE PRICE ACTION AND DAILY HIGH FORMATION
The market drops back down below a short-term low. An Optimal Trade Entry (OTE) can be identified from the previous low to high.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Market Maker Series Vol. 5 of 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ANALYSIS OF MONDAY'S PRICE ACTION AND BIAS
final_chunks.text:
ANALYSIS OF MONDAY'S PRICE ACTION AND BIAS
Again, this is Sunday, we wouldn't expect anything there. Monday we see it open here, a little bit of movement above it, but it does in fact pierce Friday's low and it comes back and closes where it opens.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Essentials To Trading The Daily Bias_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LESSER TIMEFRAME TARGETS AFTER LIQUIDITY POOL RAID
final_chunks.text:
LESSER TIMEFRAME TARGETS AFTER LIQUIDITY POOL RAID
That was framed as we see on our Market Maker Manipulation template. The discount Market PD array is going to be used on a time frame lesser than the premium liquidity pool that was used.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Short Term Trading Blending IPDA Data Ranges & PD Arrays_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: CONSOLIDATION DESTROY BEARISH FRIDAY (LOW PROBABILITY)
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Short Term Trading Market Maker Manipulation Templates_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: WEEKLY RANGE AND LIQUIDITY ENGINEERING
final_chunks.text:
WEEKLY RANGE AND LIQUIDITY ENGINEERING
So, we're looking at the daily chart, we're going to drop down into the hourly chart. Now what I have here is a framework for looking at the weekly range on an hourly chart.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 2_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: WEDNESDAY WEEKLY REVERSAL (BULLISH)
final_chunks.text:
WEDNESDAY WEEKLY REVERSAL (BULLISH)
This market profile is bullish, indicating an expectation for higher prices. Drives lower into a higher time frame discount array to induce sell stops. When the market is trading at a long-term or intermediate-term low.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Short Term Trading Defining Weekly Range Profiles_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING SELL STOPS AND LIQUIDITY RAIDS
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING SELL STOPS AND LIQUIDITY RAIDS
Consider a chart with equal lows. While retail-minded traders perceive these as support for a buy, institutional traders recognize them as a liquidity pool containing sell stops. The market often moves to attack these sell stops.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - What New Traders Should Focus On_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: CLASSIC TUESDAY LOW OF THE WEEK
final_chunks.text:
CLASSIC TUESDAY LOW OF THE WEEK
The market trades down on Tuesday into a discount. This discount comes in the form of an old monthly, weekly, or daily low. The purpose is to run a liquidity pool, specifically running out sell stops.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Short Term Trading Market Maker Manipulation Templates_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ENGINEERING SHORT LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING SHORT LIQUIDITY
When anticipating a bullish range expansion to the upside (a higher close), we hunt for a manipulation cycle immediately after the opening price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PREVIOUS DAY LOW (PDL) DEFINITION AND PRE-WEEK ANALYSIS
final_chunks.text:
PREVIOUS DAY LOW (PDL) DEFINITION AND PRE-WEEK ANALYSIS
I shared this chart also in the forum, and I want you to take note of how price did in fact seek liquidity below previous day's lows. That's what the PDL stands for: previous day low.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model 1_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DISPLACEMENT TOWARDS LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
DISPLACEMENT TOWARDS LIQUIDITY
When observing price, look for decisive displacement, not just a drift. Price indicates it is reaching for something, specifically the liquidity resting below old lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Institutional Price Action： Micro-Market Structure & Time & Price Concepts Part 02_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: TARGETS FOR SELL-SIDE LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
TARGETS FOR SELL-SIDE LIQUIDITY
The market would go into a specific area but not trade to the top of a particular candle. Price would draw down into and beyond previously identified levels. Underneath the existing low and relative equal lows, there resides sell-side liquidity, which was a target.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 25_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET LIQUIDITY AND SMART MONEY DYNAMICS
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 05 - Defining HTF PD Arrays_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LOW AS RESISTANCE)
final_chunks.text:
LOW AS RESISTANCE)
Another scenario for Wednesday High of the Week, for an overall bearish market. A fair value gap or liquidity void is filled, then the market runs through it for stops. This is a retest to an old low, returning to a premium Market in front of an old monthly, weekly, or daily low.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 07 - Short Term Trading Market Maker Manipulation Templates_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MAPPING MORNING RANGE AND LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
MAPPING MORNING RANGE AND LIQUIDITY
Mapping out the morning's potential lows at 4072 (sell-side liquidity). This is an internal dialogue for mapping, not a definitive call. Upside is above the Old New Week Opening Gap High (not the present week's).
final_chunks.source: March 30, 2023 Live Tape Reading - AM Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: TARGETING SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY AND TRUSTING NEW WEEK OPENING GAPS
final_chunks.text:
TARGETING SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY AND TRUSTING NEW WEEK OPENING GAPS
Spoofing is a real thing. Spoofing is when you put an order there and then by the time it gets, or gets close to it, they pull the order away. So it's a gimmick, okay.
final_chunks.source: March 08, 2023 Live Tape Reading ⧹ Fed Chair Testimony 10am_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PM SESSION LOWS AND JUDAS SWING
final_chunks.text:
PM SESSION LOWS AND JUDAS SWING
If you are bullish and the market is trading near the opening (9:30 AM, denoted by an orange line): Anticipation: Expect a run lower, a "Judas swing," below the previous day's PM session lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - One Trading Setup For Life_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET MOVEMENT AND KEY LIQUIDITY/IMBALANCE ZONES
final_chunks.text:
MARKET MOVEMENT AND KEY LIQUIDITY/IMBALANCE ZONES
The market created relative equal highs before breaking down. A fair value gap (FVG) was provided live, detailing the process of running out the sell-side. The Sunday opening gap was also identified as a key level.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 34_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PURPOSE OF LIQUIDITY SWEEPS AND THE 'REAL MOVE' TARGET
final_chunks.text:
PURPOSE OF LIQUIDITY SWEEPS AND THE 'REAL MOVE' TARGET
The market takes out these long holders because they are not meant to profit from the 'real move. ' The real move was hinted at 12553. 25, which was the true draw on liquidity.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 30_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SIGNIFICANT MOVES AFTER STOP RAIDS
final_chunks.text:
SIGNIFICANT MOVES AFTER STOP RAIDS
Chasing price will deplete your account very quickly. Significant price moves are typically seen immediately after stops are rated.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex Scout Sniper Basic Field Guide - Vol. 8_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FOMC MANIPULATION AND ALGORITHM'S LIQUIDITY SWEEP
final_chunks.text:
FOMC MANIPULATION AND ALGORITHM'S LIQUIDITY SWEEP
The market goes into a dive in New York, then rallies up and closes the day. On FOMC day at 2:00 p. m. in the afternoon, the market trades down, taking out a short-term low, and then rallies.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Market Maker Series Vol. 5 of 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LONDON SESSION RAIDS (ETH) AND SETUP EXECUTION
final_chunks.text:
LONDON SESSION RAIDS (ETH) AND SETUP EXECUTION
When analyzing a full 24-hour rotation, if price is not in close proximity to the previous PM session range at Time Window: The range between 2:00 AM and 5:00 AM New York local time.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - One Trading Setup For Life_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BEARISH ENTRIES
final_chunks.text:
BEARISH ENTRIES
Note the European opening price on Tuesday and filter all shorts at or above this price level. Anticipate a 15-minute chart optimal trade entry to form inside of the retracement higher during London open and/or New York open kill zones, or a buy stop raid.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model 2 Trade Plan & Algorithmic Theory_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ENGINEERING LONG LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
ENGINEERING LONG LIQUIDITY
When bearish, we anticipate manipulation. The form of manipulation we expect to see is engineering long liquidity. This involves a quick, sudden movement higher to entice breakout artists who want to buy. They will be placed on the wrong side of the marketplace.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: NEUTRALIZING LONG LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
NEUTRALIZING LONG LIQUIDITY
Another form of manipulation in bullish conditions is neutralizing long liquidity. This means individuals who are already long or recently bought near the opening price have their positions upset by the drop below the opening price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - Accumulation - Manipulation - Distribution_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: COMMERCIAL POSITIONING AND LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
COMMERCIAL POSITIONING AND LIQUIDITY
Commercials pair orders above an old high where there's a high pool of liquid participants willing to buy. Buy stops are triggered for short holders, and breakout artists buy the breakout.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model #4 Supplementary Lesson_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PM SESSION SILVER BULLET & MARKET ON CLOSE MACRO
final_chunks.text:
PM SESSION SILVER BULLET & MARKET ON CLOSE MACRO
The afternoon session saw a turn, rallying and then consolidating, before ripping higher. This attacked the buy side, the old buy side liquidity pool, and the weekly volume imbalance.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Review Precision Results_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SMART MONEY TACTICS AND BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY VOID
final_chunks.text:
SMART MONEY TACTICS AND BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY VOID
Smart money, due to their large order sizes, must scale in their positions gradually. They cannot facilitate their entire net short position at a single price.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Liquidity Voids_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET MANIPULATION AND ANTICIPATED BUY SIDE RAID
final_chunks.text:
MARKET MANIPULATION AND ANTICIPATED BUY SIDE RAID
ICT observes a high where retail traders might anticipate lower prices, but his mindset is to 'attack them. ' He expects an aggressive run above existing highs into 4092.
final_chunks.source: ICT February 2023 FOMC_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY HUNT
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY HUNT
The objective was to see a specific low taken out. This area held 'buy-side' liquidity, which are buy stops typically targeted by breakout traders using trend lines. The strategy involved taking the buy-side first, then running the 'sell-side relative equal lows'.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Review Of The Interactive Study 090123 NFP NQ Short_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: NEW WEEK OPENING GAP AND LONDON SESSION LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
NEW WEEK OPENING GAP AND LONDON SESSION LIQUIDITY
The attention last Friday was called to this specific level. Following the weekend, the market opened and created the new week opening gap. Subsequently, the market rallied through this gap to specific levels.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Opening Range Gap Repricing Macro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MORNING AND AFTERNOON LIQUIDITY HUNTS
final_chunks.text:
MORNING AND AFTERNOON LIQUIDITY HUNTS
Relative equal highs created, indicating buy-side liquidity (buy stops) resting above. Right before the lunch hour, price slightly goes above these highs, then trades down, entering the Post-lunch (after 1:00 PM), monitor for indications of higher prices.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PINPOINTING LIQUIDITY POOLS FROM KEY DAILY LOWS
final_chunks.text:
PINPOINTING LIQUIDITY POOLS FROM KEY DAILY LOWS
I have all of the key lows from day one. That particular day, its low is recorded and extended across the chart.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model 1_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FAIR VALUE GAP AND LIQUIDITY DRAW
final_chunks.text:
FAIR VALUE GAP AND LIQUIDITY DRAW
A correction was issued regarding a previous tweet: a Fair Value Gap (FVG) was mistakenly identified on the 2-minute chart, but it was actually on the 5-minute chart. This 5-minute FVG initially offered short-term resistance.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - August 14, 2023 NQ Futures Review_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ANTICIPATING THE LOW
final_chunks.text:
ANTICIPATING THE LOW
In a bullish scenario, the market gyrates day by day (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday).
final_chunks.source: ICT Forex - The Weekly Bias - Excellence In Short Term Trading_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: TARGETING THE NEW WEEK OPENING GAP EXTREMES
final_chunks.text:
TARGETING THE NEW WEEK OPENING GAP EXTREMES
After taking eighty percent of the position off, the thought process shifts to targeting the top end of the new week opening gap, represented by the high end of the shaded orange area.
final_chunks.source: January 31, 2023 PM Session Example ⧹ New Week Opening Gap_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND BREAKER
final_chunks.text:
BUY SIDE LIQUIDITY AND BREAKER
Dropping down into the hourly chart here, you can see the buy side liquidity pool, an area of interest for Chaining off of that old imbalance on the daily chart, the discount fair value gap is present.
final_chunks.source: ICT Emini S&P 500 Review - March 27, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json
